step_by_step_thinking:
To add another layer of support, studies have shown that improper brushing techniques can lead to significant damage over time, especially if bristles wear down and become more abrasive with use. Additionally, many patients report using hard-bristled brushes without realizing the long-term harm it causes.

Agree - A Based on additional evidence showing how improper brushing technique and worn-out bristles contribute significantly to gum tissue damage, I concur that toothbrush trauma remains the most prevalent factor causing gingival recession. Answer choice: A.
